hi sir,
this is pratap your butler in burj al arab hotel, 
about me i did 3 year degree course in hotel management from institute of hotel management, national council , PUSA,new delhi, in which we learn about whole hotel department as this is degree course and in india it is one of the best institute of hotel management, they are not specifically teaching about butler , specially they  teach us whole department of hotel after that we have to decide in which department we have to go.
rest everything is fine
pratap
butler
burj al arab hotel
dubai
